channel.title: Atlassian — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Atlassian (atlassian).

item.title: CVE-2026-21575 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 3.4.11 of Sourcetree for Mac and Sourcetree for Windows. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.1, allows an authenticated attacker…

item.title: CVE-2026-21577 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: This High severity DoS (Denial of Service) vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.0.1, 9.1.0, 9.2.0, 9.3.1, 9.4.0, 9.5.1, 10.0.2, 10.1.0 and 10.2.0 of Confluence Data Center. This DoS (Denial of Service) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.1, a…

item.title: CVE-2026-21579 · 8.2 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Information Disclosure vulnerability was introduced in versions 7.17.0, 7.19.0, 8.5.0, 8.9.0, 9.0.1, 9.1.0, 9.2.0, 10.0.2, 10.1.0, and 10.2.0 of Confluence Data Center. This Information Disclosure vulnerability, with a CVSS Score o…

item.title: CVE-2026-21571 · 9.4 CRITICAL
item.description: This Critical severity OS Command Injection vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.6.0, 10.0.0, 10.1.0, 10.2.0, 11.0.0, 11.1.0, 12.0.0, and 12.1.0 of Bamboo Data Center. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 9.4 and…

item.title: CVE-2026-21570 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.6.0, 10.0.0, 10.1.0, 10.2.0, 11.0.0, 11.1.0, 12.0.0, and 12.1.0 of Bamboo Data Center. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.6,…

item.title: CVE-2026-21569 · 7.9 HIGH
item.description: This High severity XXE (XML External Entity Injection) vulnerability was introduced in version 7.1.0 of Crowd Data Center and Server. This XXE (XML External Entity Injection) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.9, allows an authenticated attacker t…

item.title: CVE-2025-22178 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to view items on the "Why" page.

item.title: CVE-2025-22169 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to subscribe to an item/object without having the e…

item.title: CVE-2025-22173 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to view certain sprint data without the required pe…

item.title: CVE-2025-22170 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user without sufficient privileges to perform an action could if they included a particular state-related parameter of a user with sufficient privileges to perform the action.

item.title: CVE-2025-22174 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to view portfolio rooms without the required permis…

item.title: CVE-2025-22172 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to read external reports without the required permi…

item.title: CVE-2025-22176 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to view audit log items.

item.title: CVE-2025-22171 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user is able to alter the private checklists of other users.

item.title: CVE-2025-22168 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to read the steps of another user's private checkli…

item.title: CVE-2025-22177 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to view other team overviews.

item.title: CVE-2025-22175 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Jira Align is vulnerable to an authorization issue. A low-privilege user can access unexpected endpoints that disclose a small amount of sensitive information. For example, a low-level user was able to modify the steps of another user's private check…

item.title: CVE-2025-22167 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Path Traversal (Arbitrary Write) vulnerability was introduced in versions: 9.12.0, 10.3.0 and remain present in 11.0.0 of Jira Software Data Center and Server. This Path Traversal (Arbitrary Write) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score…

item.title: CVE-2025-22166 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: This High severity DoS (Denial of Service) vulnerability was introduced in version 2.0 of Confluence Data Center. This DoS (Denial of Service) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.3, allows an attacker to cause a resource to be unavailable for its i…

item.title: CVE-2025-22165 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: This Medium severity ACE (Arbitrary Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 4.2.8 of Sourcetree for Mac. This ACE (Arbitrary Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 5.9, allows a locally authenticated attacker to execute a…

item.title: CVE-2025-22157 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: This High severity PrivEsc (Privilege Escalation) vulnerability was introduced in versions: 9.12.0, 10.3.0, 10.4.0, and 10.5.0 of Jira Core Data Center and Server 5.12.0, 10.3.0, 10.4.0, and 10.5.0 of Jira Service Management Data Center and Server Th…

item.title: CVE-2023-22514 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 3.4.14 of Sourcetree for Mac and Sourcetree for Windows. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.8, and a CVSS Vector of: CVSS:3.0/A…

item.title: CVE-2023-22512 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: This High severity DoS (Denial of Service) vulnerability was introduced in version 5.6.0 of Confluence Data Center and Server. With a CVSS Score of 7.5, this vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to cause a resource to be unavailable for i…

item.title: CVE-2019-15002 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: An exploitable CSRF vulnerability exists in Atlassian Jira, from versions 7.6.4 to 8.1.0. The login form doesn’t require a CSRF token. As a result, an attacker can log a user into the system under an unexpected account.

item.title: CVE-2024-21703 · 6.4 MEDIUM
item.description: This Medium severity Security Misconfiguration vulnerability was introduced in version 8.8.1 of Confluence Data Center and Server for Windows installations. This Security Misconfiguration vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 6.4 allows an authenticate…

item.title: CVE-2024-21697 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in versions 4.2.8 of Sourcetree for Mac and 3.4.19 for Sourcetree for Windows. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.8, allows an unauthentic…

item.title: CVE-2024-21690 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Reflected XSS and CSRF (Cross-Site Request Forgery) vulnerability was introduced in versions 7.19.0, 7.20.0, 8.0.0, 8.1.0, 8.2.0, 8.3.0, 8.4.0, 8.5.0, 8.6.0, 8.7.1, 8.8.0, and 8.9.0 of Confluence Data Center and Server. This Reflec…

item.title: CVE-2024-21689 · 7.6 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability CVE-2024-21689 was introduced in versions 9.1.0, 9.2.0, 9.3.0, 9.4.0, 9.5.0, and 9.6.0 of Bamboo Data Center and Server. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of…

item.title: CVE-2024-21684 · 3.1 LOW
item.description: There is a low severity open redirect vulnerability within affected versions of Bitbucket Data Center. Versions of Bitbucket DC from 8.0.0 to 8.9.12 and 8.19.0 to 8.19.1 are affected by this vulnerability. It is patched in 8.9.13 and 8.19.2. This ope…

item.title: CVE-2024-21687 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: This High severity File Inclusion vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.0.0, 9.1.0, 9.2.0, 9.3.0, 9.4.0, 9.5.0 and 9.6.0 of Bamboo Data Center and Server. This File Inclusion vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.1, allows an authenticated attac…

item.title: CVE-2024-21686 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Stored XSS vulnerability was introduced in versions 7.13 of Confluence Data Center and Server. This Stored XSS vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.3, allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary HTML or JavaScript code o…

item.title: CVE-2024-21685 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Information Disclosure vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.4.0, 9.12.0, and 9.15.0 of Jira Core Data Center. This Information Disclosure vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.4, allows an unauthenticated attacker to view sen…

item.title: CVE-2024-21683 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 5.2 of Confluence Data Center and Server. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.2, allows an authenticated attacker to execute arb…

item.title: CVE-2024-21677 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Path Traversal vulnerability was introduced in version 6.13.0 of Confluence Data Center. This Path Traversal vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.3, allows an unauthenticated attacker to exploit an undefinable vulnerability which…

item.title: CVE-2024-21678 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Stored XSS vulnerability was introduced in version 2.7.0 of Confluence Data Center. This Stored XSS vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.5, allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary HTML or JavaScript code on a victims…

item.title: CVE-2024-21682 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Injection vulnerability was introduced in Assets Discovery 1.0 - 6.2.0 (all versions). Assets Discovery, which can be downloaded via Atlassian Marketplace, is a network scanning tool that can be used with or without an agent with J…

item.title: CVE-2024-21673 · 8 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was introduced in versions 7.13.0 of Confluence Data Center and Server. Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.0 and a CVSS Vector of CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:N…

item.title: CVE-2024-21672 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was introduced in version 2.1.0 of Confluence Data Center and Server. Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.3 and a CVSS Vector of CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S…

item.title: CVE-2023-22527 · 10 CRITICAL 💥
item.description: A template injection vulnerability on older versions of Confluence Data Center and Server allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve RCE on an affected instance. Customers using an affected version must take immediate action. Most recent supported…

item.title: CVE-2024-21674 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was introduced in version 7.13.0 of Confluence Data Center and Server. Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.6 and a CVSS Vector of CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/…

item.title: CVE-2023-22526 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 7.19.0 of Confluence Data Center. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.2, allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary c…

item.title: CVE-2023-22522 · 9 CRITICAL
item.description: This Template Injection vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker, including one with anonymous access, to inject unsafe user input into a Confluence page. Using this approach, an attacker is able to achieve Remote Code Execution (RCE) on an aff…

item.title: CVE-2023-22523 · 9.8 CRITICAL
item.description: This vulnerability, if exploited, allows an attacker to perform privileged RCE (Remote Code Execution) on machines with the Assets Discovery agent installed. The vulnerability exists between the Assets Discovery application (formerly known as Insight…

item.title: CVE-2023-22524 · 9.6 CRITICAL
item.description: Certain versions of the Atlassian Companion App for MacOS were affected by a remote code execution vulnerability. An attacker could utilize WebSockets to bypass Atlassian Companion’s blocklist and MacOS Gatekeeper to allow execution of code.

item.title: CVE-2023-22516 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in versions 8.1.0, 8.2.0, 9.0.0, 9.1.0, 9.2.0, and 9.3.0 of Bamboo Data Center and Server. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.5, allows an…

item.title: CVE-2023-22521 · 8 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 3.4.6 of Crowd Data Center and Server. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.0, allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitr…

item.title: CVE-2023-22518 · 10 CRITICAL 💥
item.description: All versions of Confluence Data Center and Server are affected by this unexploited vulnerability. This Improper Authorization vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to reset Confluence and create a Confluence instance administrator account.…

item.title: CVE-2023-22515 · 10 CRITICAL 💥
item.description: Atlassian has been made aware of an issue reported by a handful of customers where external attackers may have exploited a previously unknown vulnerability in publicly accessible Confluence Data Center and Server instances to create unauthorized Conf…

item.title: CVE-2023-22513 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability was introduced in version 8.0.0 of Bitbucket Data Center and Server. This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.5, allows an authenticated attacker to execute ar…

item.title: CVE-2023-22506 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: This High severity Injection and RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability known as CVE-2023-22506 was introduced in version 8.0.0 of Bamboo Data Center. This Injection and RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 7.5, allows a…
